remarks: Great opportunity to own at a perfect location close to downtown Stamford at an affordable price! This home features 2 good-sized bedrooms, 1 full bathroom, a spacious living room, and a formal dining room. The property is being sold in as-is condition and needs some TLC, but it has very good bones and endless possibilities to make it your own. Additional features include a spacious unfinished basement providing plenty of storage or future expansion potential, as well as a detached 2-car garage. Conveniently located just minutes from downtown Stamford, close to parks, major highways, shopping, restaurants, and public transportation. A great alternative to renting and an excellent opportunity to build equity in a prime location! Schedule your viewing today!
